objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- macd(fast_period=9, slow_period=20, signal_period=7)
- rsi(period=14)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 45 and rsi < 80
- short: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
- condition: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 5.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (5.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining MACD with RSI and ATR indicators can enhance trade signals by considering the momentum of price movements along with overbought/oversold conditions and market volatility.
